schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: AWS SDK v3 client packages — bumped together to keep request signing / middleware versions consistent across the cloud-scan plugin
Smithy runtime — coupled to @aws-sdk versions but published independently; group separately so an SDK bump that is awaiting a smithy release doesn't block the SDK PR
TypeScript ESLint — parser and rules ship in lockstep; mismatched versions break the rule schema
Tailwind CSS v4 packages — engine and Vite plugin are version-coupled in v4
Vitest core + companion packages — bump together to avoid type-vs-runtime version skew
GitHub Actions in workflow YAML — matches the Renovate App's Workflows: Read & Write permission (RIFT-70 audit)
pnpm itself — packageManager field; minor/patch only via Renovate, manual review for majors
Electron major bumps need coordinated better-sqlite3 prebuild verification (see CLAUDE.md § Native modules); never auto-merge
